arts.ttl: Friday’s briefing: Man Utd, Tottenham and Rangers secure Europa League progress
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes’ hat-trick helped United beat Real Sociedad 4-1, while Friday will see new England boss Thomas Tuchel name his first squad.

We did look more like ourselves but we've still got levels to go, because I still think players like Romero, Micky and Wilson and Dom and all these guys are still building their way up to match fitness and match sharpness. I think it's the first time - somebody said - since October we've had our four leaders on the park - Vicario, Romero, Maddison and Sonny.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou press conference LIVE - Spurs boss on Odobert, Bergvall and Maddison
arts.sum: Spurs came into the game looking to reverse the single goal deficit from the first leg in Alkmaar and they levelled matters when Wilson Odobert scored on 26 minutes. Fast pressing from Son Heung-min forced an Alkmaar pass to be deflected off him into the path of Dominic Solanke and the striker showed calmness to tee up Odobert to fire his first goal for the club past the goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: Ange: Spurs starting to look more like themselves with returning stars
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou says it is no surprise that Tottenham Hotspur are getting back to winning ways now their injured players are starting to return to fitness, after progressing to the Europa League quarter-finals with victory over AZ Alkmaar.

arts.ttl: The Verdict: 'Spurs' season will be a disaster if they don't win Europa League'
arts.sum: Sky Sports' Will Bitibiri and James Cole discuss Tottenham Hotspur's crucial win over AZ Alkmaar in the Europa League that sees the North London side progress to the Europa League quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: Tottenham create exclusive Europa League goalscoring club as Wilson Odobert joins teenage history-makers
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur write a new page of European football history in their 3-1 win over AZ Alkmaar in the second leg of their Europa League last-16 showdown.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou hails Tottenham’s ‘four leaders’ after Europa League victory
arts.sum: Captain Son Heung-min was involved in all three goals, while James Maddison hit the second in a 3-1 win.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou highlights 'very valuable' advantage for Tottenham ahead of Europa League quarter-final
arts.sum: Spurs will host Eintracht Frankfurt in the first leg on April 10 before travelling to Germany a week later

arts.ttl: Tottenham already know next Europa League opponents after AZ victory
arts.sum: Tottenham will play Eintracht Frankfurt in the Europa League quarter-finals following Ange Postecoglou's crucial second-leg 3-1 victory over AZ Alkmaar. Tottenham won in their first meeting in north London 3-2 and the reverse fixture in Germany finished 0-0.

arts.ttl: 'He was absolutely fantastic': James Maddison says Tottenham youngster was incredible in tonight's Europa League win
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are through to the quarter-finals of the Europa League after getting past AZ Alkmaar on Thursday night. Spurs lost 1-0 in the last-16...
